raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1113 aims to enrich the lives of children with disabilities by promoting opportunities to learn in general educational environments alongside peers without disabilities.",
    "Research shows that both students with disabilities and their peers without disabilities benefit from inclusion in general education.",
    "Students included in general education demonstrate lower dropout rates, suspension rates, and other risk factors compared to those who are excluded.",
    "California had one of the lowest inclusion rates for students with disabilities in the 2017-18 academic year, at 56%, compared to a national average of 63.4%.",
    "The Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA) requires that students be educated in the least restrictive environment."
  ]
}
```
